name: Ariful Islam
bio: Competitive programming partner from university. We usually talk about React and backend architecture.

name: Sarah Ahmed
bio: Best friend since primary school. She is a graphic designer and we love discussing art and photography.

name: Tanvir Rahman
bio: Met during a hiking trip to Sylhet. Shared interest in trekking and camping in the mountains.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Senior from college who guided me through web development. Very busy professional but always helpful.

name: Rakib Hossain
bio: Gym buddy. We push each other to stay consistent with our workout routines and healthy diet.

name: Priya Das
bio: Long-time neighbor. We often exchange recipes and try out new restaurants in the city.

name: Mahmudul Hasan
bio: Former colleague from my first internship. Great mentor for career advice and industry insights.

name: Zarin Subah
bio: Member of our local book club. We love debating about classic literature and modern sci-fi novels.
